title: Key stage 2 attainment 2025: national headlines
body: "This publication provides national level statistics for attainment in key stage 2 national curriculum assessments (commonly known as SATs) for pupils in schools in England.  It includes national level results from the following key stage 2 assessments:   reading test maths test grammar, punctuation and spelling test writing teacher assessment science teacher assessment  "

taxons.title: Key stage 1 and 2 assessments data collection
